subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond the mention of all created things and exalted above the attributes of contingent beings, befitteth the Sovereign of the Throne of Grandeur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر کائنات و منزه از شئونات ممکنات سلطان سریر عظمت را لایق و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @suffering and imprisonment, @firmness in the Covenant, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
